strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js/TypeScript and React-adjacent frontends
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD background including authoring test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and teaching TDD
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
React exposure is limited to one role (Optilyz); frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js
No explicit Kotlin experience and limited recent Java work; cloud experience cites AWS only (no GCP/Azure/K8s depth beyond GISCollective)

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at current role
Missing Nest.js and thin recent React/Kotlin evidence

response.justification: Candidate clearly exceeds the 6+ years fullstack bar with TypeScript/Node.js as primary tools at re:cinq, Optilyz, and RIDE, and explicitly cites AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq — a direct hit on the AI agent requirement. Testing expertise is exceptional (built D test frameworks, taught TDD/Selenium courses), and databases (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL) plus Docker are covered. Gaps: Nest.js is not mentioned, React appears only at Optilyz with most frontend work in Ember.js/Dlang, and Kotlin is absent from the skill list. Cloud is AWS-only via CDK. Strong engineering signal overall with framework-specific ramp-up needed.
